boundaries: Research-only static analysis. Not investment advice. This tool does not fetch live data, connect to brokers, place orders, recommend buys, sells, holds, target allocations, or trades, predict returns, or produce personalized financial advice.
safety_notes: Run local static commands only; no network access or broker connection is part of the walkthrough.
Do not add live market data, broker actions, trading recommendations, or personalized advice.
Treat review-ledger blockers as release blockers until the input text is revised.

steps.expected_result: Markdown and JSON command matrix are written under demo/.
steps.title: Inspect available commands

steps.expected_result: A neutral thesis packet is written as Markdown and JSON.
steps.title: Build the packet from static examples

steps.expected_result: A review ledger flags low-confidence or advice-like input text.
steps.title: Review evidence safety

steps.command: macro-policy-thesis-map thesis-impact-brief && macro-policy-thesis-map exposure-map && macro-policy-thesis-map scenario-library
steps.expected_result: Synthetic sensitivity, exposure, and scenario maps are written as Markdown and JSON.
steps.title: Render static sensitivity and exposure layers

steps.expected_result: Bounded assumptions and CSV dictionary differences are written as Markdown and JSON.
steps.title: Review schema adaptation surfaces

steps.command: macro-policy-thesis-map troubleshoot && macro-policy-thesis-map docs-export && macro-policy-thesis-map cli-help
steps.expected_result: Operator troubleshooting, docs export, and CLI help surfaces are written as Markdown and JSON.
steps.title: Read operator support surfaces

steps.command: macro-policy-thesis-map adoption-notes && macro-policy-thesis-map reviewer-scorecard && macro-policy-thesis-map release-deck
steps.expected_result: Release-owner notes, scorecard, and deck are written as Markdown and JSON.
steps.title: Read release-owner promotion notes

steps.command: macro-policy-thesis-map landing-page && macro-policy-thesis-map api-reference && macro-policy-thesis-map workflow-protocol && macro-policy-thesis-map example-pack && macro-policy-thesis-map roadmap-next
steps.expected_result: Landing, API reference, workflow protocol, example pack, and roadmap artifacts are written as Markdown, JSON, and HTML.
steps.title: Generate public visitor and protocol surfaces

steps.command: macro-policy-thesis-map trust-report && macro-policy-thesis-map citation-map && macro-policy-thesis-map release-faq && macro-policy-thesis-map artifact-index && macro-policy-thesis-map evaluator-scorecard
steps.expected_result: Trust report, citation map, FAQ, artifact index, and evaluator scorecard are written as Markdown and JSON.
steps.title: Generate public trust layer

steps.command: macro-policy-thesis-map benchmark-suite && macro-policy-thesis-map integration-cookbook && macro-policy-thesis-map compatibility-report && macro-policy-thesis-map maintainer-guide && macro-policy-thesis-map golden-fixtures && macro-policy-thesis-map regression-summary
steps.expected_result: Benchmark, integration, compatibility, maintainer, golden fixture, and regression artifacts are written as Markdown and JSON.
steps.title: Generate public evaluator hardening surfaces

steps.expected_result: A deterministic bundle manifest is written under demo/bundle_export/.
steps.title: Export the public promotion bundle manifest

steps.expected_result: A public readiness report lists pass/fail gates.
steps.title: Check public readiness

steps.command: macro-policy-thesis-map selfcheck && macro-policy-thesis-map public-scan && macro-policy-thesis-map diff-check
steps.expected_result: All commands exit successfully before sharing artifacts.
steps.title: Run final local checks
